# P2P File Send

P2P File Send is a Zero-Config peer-to-peer (P2P) file sharing web application.

## The Problem
Emailing large files is clunky, and cloud uploads are too slow. Sending a file from your phone to a Smart TV, interactive board, or a colleague's laptop often requires cables or USB drives.

## The Solution
This Zero-Config P2P File Share tool allows devices on the same local network (LAN or Wi-Fi) to discover each other automatically. 
- Fast & Direct: Files are transferred peer-to-peer (P2P) directly between devices via WebRTC. No intermediate servers or cloud storage involved.
- Secure & Private: Your files never leave your local network.
- Unlimited Size: Send large files instantly without artificial size restrictions.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Does this work across different networks?**
A: Yes! If you are not on the same Wi-Fi, you can use the "Remote Connection" feature to generate a secure 6-digit Share Code. The other device enters this code to establish a direct secure tunnel across the internet.

**Q: Is there a file size limit?**
A: No. Because files are streamed directly between your devices and are never stored on our servers, there are no artificial file size limits.

**Q: Is my data safe?**
A: Yes. All file transfers are encrypted end-to-end using standard WebRTC protocols. Your files pass directly from device A to device B.
